query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(p.load_value * p.burden_ratio), 0) as "load_value_sum!"
        FROM projects p
        WHERE p.assigned_date IS NOT NULL 
          AND p.assigned_date < TO_DATE($1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 month'
          AND p.current_scheduled_date >= TO_DATE($1, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
